state.incident_window: NimbusAPI May 2026 uptime and maintenance-notice dispute
state.ruling_reason: The independent monitor is the primary evidence and reports an uptime of 99.1%, which is below the 99.5% SLA commitment. The 300-minute maintenance window on May 12 does not qualify for exclusion as it was announced only 2 hours in advance, failing the 24-hour notice requirement in SLA-2. Therefore, all 402 minutes of downtime count, resulting in a breach that falls within the 98.00% to 99.49% range for a partial refund per SLA-3.
